creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #28)

As I mentioned earlier, the patch did not seem like it would help in my environment because I'm using GSSAPI with PAM disabled.

Are you saying that I need to disable GSSAPI and enable PAM, and configure PAM to use the MIT libraries? Which authentication method(s) should be enabled?

BTW, I have never built or patched the base system before, so that could be a challenge for me. I'm sure the handbook has some good information, but I'll gladly accept any pointers on that process.
